base_selection: greedy max unique two-sided relation signatures, lexicographic tie-break
d6_marker: marked D6 Coxeter-polarity d20 selector; canonical separating base derived from two-sided coherent relation signatures
formula: Derive the 9216 coherent lifts from the regular ordered-pair orbital, select the A0-A5 reduced greedy full-closure generator basis, then reconstruct each full permutation from its images on the canonical separating base.
